scripts.task:help:
echo "
Firewise Task Runner
====================

Scheduled (run these via cron):
  npm run task:daily       — update-currency, process-dca, dividend-sync, savings-interest
  npm run task:weekly      — price-cache-cleanup
  npm run task:monthly     — portfolio-snapshot

Individual tasks:
  npm run task:update-currency       Update exchange rates from external API
  npm run task:dca                   Generate pending DCA confirmations for due plans
  npm run task:dividend-sync         Sync dividends from yfinance into dividends table
  npm run task:savings-interest      Credit interest for all savings accounts that are due
  npm run task:price-cleanup         Delete price_cache records older than 7 days
  npm run task:portfolio-snapshot    Generate portfolio snapshots

Parameters:
  task:portfolio-snapshot
    -- --month=YYYY-MM   Override target month (default: prev month + current month)
    Example: npm run task:portfolio-snapshot -- --month=2026-05

Notes:
  - All tasks are idempotent and safe to re-run
  - savings-interest uses simple interest (not compound)
  - portfolio-snapshot always runs current month; backfills prev month if missing
"
